title: 333 Finally on preorder
wikitext:
[]: 3.33 Finally on preorder!             Quote Post by Dancougar82 » Sat Sep 20, 2014 4:26 am It's about time. Now here's hoping that they don't yank it again. http://shop.funimation.com/Shop/ShopProductDetail.ss?itemid=81838

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Sep 20, 2014 4:49 am That page doesn't say, but if you add it to your cart you then also see "coming soon" and an unfilled date field... And " finally on preorder"? I've had it on pre-order for over nine months now, though admittedly not at Funimation.

[]:             Quote Post by Dancougar82 » Sat Sep 20, 2014 4:56 am pwhodges wrote: That page doesn't say, but if you add it to your cart you then also see "coming soon" and an unfilled date field... And " finally on preorder"? I've had it on pre-order for over nine months now, though admittedly not at Funimation.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Sep 20, 2014 9:51 am Dancougar82 wrote: Yeah they had it on preorder on Walmart's website too, but they yanked it after a short time. Interestingly enough, they don't have it listed yet there. Even more interesting is that in the extras they don't mention the god warrior featurette.

[]:             Quote Post by amandaknox » Sat Sep 20, 2014 10:47 am Wasn't this originally due for release January this year? I'm in the UK and have to wait til February next year for release here

[]:             Quote Post by TitaniumViper » Sat Sep 20, 2014 12:18 pm amandaknox wrote: I'm in the UK and have to wait til February next year for release here

[]:             Quote Post by amandaknox » Sun Sep 21, 2014 6:48 am All sources say it's not available yet... But what's this? http://www.amazon.co.uk/gp/aw/d/B00DC21VVA/ref=mp_s_a_1_10?qid=1411299625&sr=8-10&pi=AC_SX110_SY165

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Sep 21, 2014 9:37 am That's French . The French, German, Spanish and Italian dubs have been available for around nine months. It's the English dub that's being made an issue of.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Sep 21, 2014 10:11 am Put in my pre-order on Amazon when they had it at $20 for the blu-ray.

[]:             Quote Post by Dancougar82 » Tue Oct 14, 2014 8:12 am The point of the matter is that Funimation took it off of their listings and until the time of the posting, was a veritable black hole of info. The fact that they put it on preorder and had actual info on it is a good sign of things to come.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Thu Oct 16, 2014 2:11 am Hoping for a release around Christmas.
